name: Agility Bank, National Association
description_short: FDIC-insured national bank headquartered in Houston specializing in business and personal banking with 100% deposit reinvestment into local small and mid-sized businesses.
description_long:
Agility Bank, National Association is a community bank operating as a Minority Depository Institution (MDI) based in the Houston area. The bank positions itself as a commercial community bank focused on serving business owners and entrepreneurs, with a stated mission of local economic reinvestment. Founded with an emphasis on supporting Houston's business community, Agility Bank operates both business and personal banking divisions alongside digital services.

The bank offers comprehensive banking products including business accounts (A2B Accounts), personal checking and savings accounts, business and personal lending, treasury management services, and digital banking solutions. Their digital offerings include encrypted chat, virtual safe deposit boxes, person-to-person payments, and online account opening. They provide debit card protection and payment solutions across both personal and business segments, positioning themselves as a full-service financial institution.

Agility Bank distinguishes itself through its commitment to local reinvestment—explicitly dedicating 100% of deposits to funding small and mid-sized businesses in the Houston area. The bank emphasizes personalized service combining digital technology with "the personal touch of a savvy banker." Their MDI status and community involvement programs reflect a focus on underserved markets. The bank is expanding physically, with a new full-service office opening in Clear Lake (Webster, TX) in 2026.

As an FDIC-insured national bank, Agility Bank provides deposit insurance protection and regulatory oversight. However, the website provides limited detail on specific loan products, interest rates, fees, or account minimums. For prospective customers, research into competitive rates and specific product terms would be necessary before opening accounts or applying for loans. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Business checking and savings accounts (A2B Accounts)
Digital banking platform with online access
Debit card protection and payment solutions
In-person banking at Houston and Clear Lake locations
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
100% of deposits reinvested into small and mid-sized Houston-area businesses, supporting local economic growth
Comprehensive digital banking suite including encrypted chat, virtual safe deposit box, and online account opening
Dual personal and business banking services with customizable account features
Emphasis on quick, simple, seamless lending application process
Expanding physical presence with new Clear Lake full-service office location
cons: Limited geographic presence—primarily Houston-area focused, may not serve customers in other regions
Website lacks specific information on interest rates, APYs, loan terms, and account fees
No details provided on minimum account balances or opening deposit requirements
Business lending focus may mean fewer options optimized for individual consumers
Minimal transparency on specific loan products, eligibility requirements, or approval timelines
best_for: Houston-area small business owners seeking personalized lending and banking services
Entrepreneurs who value local community reinvestment and MDI banking principles
Business owners wanting customizable commercial banking accounts with digital and in-person support
Customers prioritizing FDIC insurance and regulatory safety in a community bank setting
diagnosis: Agility Bank is best for Houston-area business owners and entrepreneurs seeking a community-focused bank that reinvests deposits locally while providing both personal and commercial banking services. Primary caveat: the bank's website lacks detailed information on rates, fees, and specific product terms, requiring direct contact for pricing comparisons, and geographic service is limited to the Houston region.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
